scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:JqNXtQrt4FjyS1RFBdYgai3hcF10lZMU+xjH/GR9

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via: [$InvVia] Via:SIP/2.0/UDP 192.168.5.12:5060;maddr=192.168.5.13;branch=z9hG4bK-18641-1-0 [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:JqNXtQrt4FjyS1RFBdYgai3hcF10lZMU+xjH/GR9
